title: Create Wooded Copper
description: Adds some wood to the copper blocks, just like how the andesite casing wood shows up on a bunch of the andesite blocks.
body:
There's something off about this screenshot in my opinion:

![Old Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a29c04deca5294deb97e5cb280afc65afb09b98f_0.webp)

You see how the casing has wood, but most other copper blocks don't? The andesite/train casings don't have that problem as you can see:

![Andesite Casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf29f0e10cda3a88953fbdf3d01ff60c4dabef7d.png)
![Train Casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a371fdc48f0be36a97a7041e87114c160a6bb98.png)

So I decided to add some much needed wooden details to the copper textures, and it looks kinda cool.

![New Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461b4ae69a9e814197f92b1880842d4aa9b98dcf.png)

So that's the resourcepack, it's a bit simple, but it was quite fun making/editing a couple of textures. I also didn't touch the insides of fluid-based blocks, since it makes sense for that to be 100% copper.


More images in the gallery.
